name: OMEGA HEALTHCARE INVESTORS INC
summary: PARTI Overview Omega Healthcare Investors, Inc. (Parent) is a Maryland corporation that invests in healthcare-related real estate properties located in the United States (U.S.), the United Kingdom (U.K.) and Canada, which investments comprise our one reportable segment. Omega became a publicly traded company listed on the New York Stock Exchange in 1992.
